flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Guilford Technical Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Guilford Technical Community College rose 31% between 2006 and 2009 (10.5% → 13.8%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Guilford Technical Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (56.3% → 64.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Guilford Technical Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (8.3k → 9.3k).
